scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/sdk && npm run build -w @permia/adapter-mcp && npm run build -w @permia/adapter-openai && npm run build -w @permia/adapter-typescript
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && vitest run packages/core/test packages/sdk/test packages/adapter-mcp/test packages/adapter-openai/test packages/adapter-typescript/test apps/web/src/lib/engine.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
